---
title: "Lecture 7: Intermediate dplyr; Renaming & Recoding Variables"
date: 2026-06-24
summary: "Intermediate dplyr; Renaming & Recoding Variables"
url_slides: 07-slides.qmd
url_code: css-materials/  # da rivedere check /factors-more-dplyr
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Info and Materials

* **Date**: {{< meta date >}}
* **Topics**: {{< meta summary >}}
* **Slides**: To be posted before class
* **Code**: To be posted before class

<!--
* **Slides**: [View Slides]({{< meta url_slides >}})
* **Code**: `usethis::use_course("{{< meta url_code >}}")`
-->


## Learning Objectives

- Review and expand your ability to manipulate data with `dplyr` functions (“verbs”)
- Rename and recode variables using `rename()`, `recode()`, and `case_when()`
- Identify syntactic vs. non-syntactic variable names and handle them correctly


## Readings

- ["Chapter 3 Data Transformation"](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform) from "R for Data Science" 2nd Edition *(This is the same Chapter from Lecture 4)*
